heading: Term of court; power of court unaffected by expiration—(Rule)
label: 3431 Term of court; power of court unaffected by expiration—(Rule)
notes: See Federal Rules of Criminal ProcedureExpiration of term without significance in criminal cases, Rule 45(c).
References in TextRule 45(c) of the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure, referred to in text, was rescinded , eff. .Feb. 28, 1966July 1, 1966
